case_title: EDUARDO O'YUDICO RUIZ VS. ROBIN PAGE

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RUIZ, EDUARDO O'YUDICO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PAGE, ROBIN $590.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $590.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF DEC-14-2020 IS CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION TO FEB-22-2021 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506.

REMARK: SMALL CLAIMS - OEX CONTINUE ORDER (FOR DEC-14-20 HEARING DATE) RETURNED. SENT TO: PLAINTIFF - EDUARDO O'YUDICO RUIZ;(ENVELOPE MARKED:RETURNED TO SENDER - ATTEMPTED - NOT KNOWN - UNABLE TO FORWARD)
ORDER OFF CALENDAR: NO APPEARANCES, NO PROOF OF SERVICE.
REMARK: NOTICE TO PLAINTIFF RETURNED BY THE POST OFFICE.
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT PAGE, ROBIN HEARING SET FOR APR-20-2020 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $590.00 FILED BY RUIZ, EDUARDO O'YUDICO AS TO DEFENDANT PAGE, ROBIN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-16-2020 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF RUIZ, EDUARDO O'YUDICO ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF JUN-22-2020 IS CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION TO AUG-17-2020 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF AUG-17-2020 IS CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO NOV-30-2020 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506 (W. TRUPEK, 506)
SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF FEB-22-2021 IS OFF CALENDAR - NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE: $0.00 WAIVER SERVED DEC-16-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT PAGE, ROBIN

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-16-2020 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF EDUARDO O'YUDICO RUIZ IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ROBIN PAGE IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS REVIEWD AND RETURNED. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-20-2020 - CONTINUED TO JUN-22-2020 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506, COURT ORDER (PF/506).
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: OEX CONTINUED ORDER MAILED TO PLAINTIFF ON 07/13/20. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - ATTEMPTED - NOT KNOWN - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
